testcase.name: listenBroadcastsFullRiderDataPayload
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-17T22:24:18.829+02:00 INFO 17045 --- [driver-location-streamer] [rListener-0-C-1] org.apache.kafka.clients.NetworkClient : [Consumer clientId=consumer-driver.location.websocket.group-1, groupId=driver.location.websocket.group] Node -1 disconnected. 2026-06-17T22:24:18.829+02:00 WARN 17045 --- [driver-location-streamer] [rListener-0-C-1] org.apache.kafka.clients.NetworkClient : [Consumer clientId=consumer-driver.location.websocket.group-1, groupId=driver.location.websocket.group] Connection to node -1 (localhost/127.0.0.1:9092) could not be established. Node may not be available. 2026-06-17T22:24:18.829+02:00 WARN 17045 --- [driver-location-streamer] [rListener-0-C-1] org.apache.kafka.clients.NetworkClient : [Consumer clientId=consumer-driver.location.websocket.group-1, groupId=driver.location.websocket.group] Bootstrap broker localhost:9092 (id: -1 rack: null isFenced: false) disconnected 2026-06-17T22:24:18.831+02:00 INFO 17045 --- [driver-location-streamer] [ main] c.m.d.k.h.DriverLocationStreamHandler : Streaming rider location from Kafka key rider-1 and payload identifier rider-1
